title: Akamai Guardicore Lateral Movement Between Segments (`guardicore:network`)
spl:
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:network" earliest=-24h
| where src_segment!=dst_segment
| stats count by src_segment, dst_segment, process_name
| where count>=20
| sort -count
description: Cross-segment flows that bypass intended choke points warrant investigation even when not yet blocked.
value: Reduces blast radius during active intrusions.
implementation: Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

references.title: Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk

grandmaExplanation: We watch Guardicore data to spot unsafe inside-the-network traffic and policy gaps before attackers pivot far.
